args.content:
# Packing List for Diamond Head Hike - June 13

## Essential Gear
- Hiking shoes with good traction
- Backpack
- Water bottle (at least 1 liter)
- Sunscreen
- Hat or cap
- Sunglasses

## Clothing
- Lightweight, breathable clothing
- Moisture-wicking t-shirt
- Comfortable hiking pants or shorts
- Extra t-shirt (in case you sweat a lot)

## Safety Items
- First aid kit (small)
- Whistle
- Phone (fully charged)
- ID and some cash

## Optional Items
- Camera or phone for photos
- Snacks (energy bars, trail mix)
- Lightweight rain jacket (just in case)
- Insect repellent

## Notes
- Start early in the morning to avoid the heat
- The hike is moderately strenuous with some steep sections
- Bring plenty of water as there are no refill stations on the trail
- The summit offers incredible views of Waikiki and the Pacific Ocean
